scenes.line: Your phone gets dozens of messages a day. Some of them are scams.
scenes.headline: Some are scams.
scenes.subtitle: USPS. Bank. IRS. WhatsApp. Gmail.

scenes.line: Live Shield reads incoming notifications on your phone, on device, and flags scams the moment they arrive.
scenes.headline: Live Shield
scenes.subtitle: Reads inbound notifications. On your phone. Nothing uploaded.

scenes.line: A fast pattern check runs on every notification. The full AI model takes a second look at anything not confidently safe.
scenes.headline: Two-stage AI.
scenes.subtitle: Lite filter first. Gemma confirms. Battery and privacy intact.

scenes.line: When ScamRadar catches one, you get a heads-up. Tap to review. Open the original. Move on.
scenes.headline: Caught a likely scam.
scenes.subtitle: Discreet alert. Your call.

scenes.line: Off by default. You choose which apps. Pause for an hour or a day. Always your call.
scenes.headline: You're in control.
scenes.subtitle: Per-app toggles. Pause for 1h / 24h. Off by default.

scenes.line: Live Shield. Always watching. Never reading.
scenes.headline: Always watching.
scenes.subtitle: Never reading.

videos.title: Set Up a Relative in 30 Seconds

scenes.line: Setting up Mom's phone usually takes an hour. ScamRadar does it in one tap.
scenes.headline: One tap for Mom.
scenes.subtitle: No more hour-long phone calls about Settings.

scenes.line: On your phone, generate a QR code. Name them. Add your number. Done.
scenes.headline: You: build the QR.
scenes.subtitle: Mom's pod join + Care Mode + your number — bundled.

scenes.line: Hand them the screen. They open ScamRadar and scan.
scenes.headline: They: scan the code.
scenes.subtitle: Camera or in-app scanner — either works.

scenes.line: Care Mode turns on. The pod joins. Your number becomes their emergency contact. One tap. Confirm. Done.
scenes.headline: Done.
scenes.subtitle: Big text. Spoken verdicts. Family alerts. Set.

scenes.line: Every scam she runs into shows up in your weekly digest. Every scam she catches helps the whole pod.
scenes.headline: You both stay protected.
scenes.subtitle: Weekly digest on Monday morning. Family alerts as they happen.

scenes.line: Help a relative in 30 seconds. Not an hour.
scenes.headline: 30 seconds.
scenes.subtitle: Not an hour.

videos.title: Care Mode — Built for the People Who Get Scammed Most

scenes.line: Sixty percent of scam losses come from people over sixty.
scenes.headline: 60% over 60.
scenes.subtitle: Scammers target seniors. We're built for them.

scenes.line: Care Mode is one switch. Bigger text. Simpler flow. Spoken verdicts.
scenes.headline: Care Mode.
scenes.subtitle: One toggle. Everything changes.

scenes.line: The home screen is just two buttons. Paste and check. Or call my family.
scenes.headline: Two buttons.
scenes.subtitle: Paste & check. Call my family. That's it.

scenes.line: When ScamRadar finds a scam, it doesn't just show a verdict. It reads it aloud.
scenes.headline: "Stop. This looks like a scam."
scenes.subtitle: Verdicts spoken at every result. Text-to-speech, on device.

scenes.line: And the family pod hears about it the moment they need to.
scenes.headline: Family alerts.
scenes.subtitle: Auto-share with the pod. Care Mode handles the rest.

scenes.line: Built for the people who get the most scam calls.
scenes.headline: For the ones who matter.
scenes.subtitle: Care Mode by ScamRadar.

scenes.line: ScamRadar's scanner is free. Always will be.
scenes.headline: Scanning is free.
scenes.subtitle: Texts. Voicemails. URLs. Live Shield. Free forever.

scenes.line: Premium unlocks the stuff you only need after a bad day.
scenes.headline: Premium.
scenes.subtitle: For the moments after.

scenes.line: Get scammed? Export a one-page incident report PDF. Take it to your bank.
scenes.headline: Incident Report PDF.
scenes.subtitle: Verdict. Redacted excerpt. Steps taken. For bank disputes.

scenes.line: Or grab the whole evidence locker. Original message. Screenshots. Classifier output. Zipped and ready for police or your lawyer.
scenes.headline: Evidence Locker.
scenes.subtitle: Original + redacted + screenshots + verdict. One ZIP.

scenes.line: Family tier covers up to eight pod members. Weekly digest. Verified family link to fight deepfake voice calls.
scenes.headline: Family tier.
scenes.subtitle: Covers 8. Weekly digest. Anti-deepfake verification.

scenes.line: Subscribe inside the app. Or stay free forever. Your call.
scenes.headline: Subscribe — or stay free.
scenes.subtitle: Your call.
